description_long: This is a compact, single-rider bicycle with a matte black frame and two medium-sized spoked wheels. The frame features a classic diamond geometry, with a straight top tube and a slightly sloped down tube connecting to the rear triangle. The handlebars are wide and rise slightly, providing an upright riding position, and are connected to a short stem. The seat is a standard saddle, positioned above the rear wheel and supported by a straight seat post. The pedals are flat and metallic, and the drivetrain is single-speed, with a visible chainring and rear cog. There are no visible accessories such as baskets, racks, or fenders, giving the bicycle a minimalist, urban-ready appearance.
description: A matte black, diamond-frame bicycle with riser handlebars, spoked wheels, and a standard saddle. It has a minimalist, urban design with no basket or rack.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide riser handlebars, front wheel, and the narrow profile of the frame.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full diamond frame geometry, both wheels, pedals, and the standard saddle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the seat, rear wheel, and the alignment of the frame and pedals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the drivetrain, chainring, and the overall structure of the bicycle.
